ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: del signor Conte Ridolfo Campeggi in questa quinta impressione arricchita con L`Aurora Ingannata favoletta per gli intermedii in musica
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On the copy 1063.a.11.(3.): `In Bologna ad instanza di Simone Perlaschi`. In the colophon the name of the printer: `In Bologna per Bartolomeo Cochi`. No mention of Campeggi belonging to the Academy. However Aurora Ingannata was represented in Melchiorre Zoppio`s house, venue of the Academia dei Gelati, on the occasion of the wedding of Ferdinando Riario`s and Laura Pepoli. Calore, `la biblioteca drammatica`, p. 66 suggests that the poem was composed by Girolamo Campeggi (l`Imperfetto), and the music by Giacobbi. Engraver/Illustrator is a mongram in the title page: CB?
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Con licenza de` superiori. Don Marcellus Baldassinus Clericus Regularis S. Pauli pro Illustrissimo, et Reverendissimo Archiepiscopo Bonon. Iterum imprimatur. Vicarius Inquisit. Bonon.
ItacWorkItem.PrinterOrnament: Yes; in the titlepage engraved plate with monogram CB
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
